{
  "from": {
    "files": [
      "events.md",
      "demos.md",
      "sources.md",
      "organizer.md",
      "team.md",
      "techstack.md"
    ]
  },
  "where_by_file": {
    "events.md": {
      "or": [
        {
          "and": [
            {
              "field": "Location",
              "op": "contains",
              "value": "Singapore"
            },
            {
              "field": "Confidence",
              "op": "in",
              "value": [
                "high",
                "medium"
              ]
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "or": [
            {
              "op": "any",
